publishedAbstract: - When creating a noobaa object the pod `noobaa-db-0` deployed fails with `CrashLoop BackOff`.- In the `Pod` `noobaa-db-0` logs the following output it's found: ~~~ error: MONGODB_ADMIN_PASSWORD has to be set. ~~~
publishedTitle: noobaa-db-0 crashloop when deploying OCS 4.6 in OCP 4
